headline: MLB winners (137 profitable): lean balanced on ownership · hammer the #1 chalk (52.9% vs field 46.9%) · 5-man stacks (62.6% of stacked, top CHC) · 1.06 high-conviction core/portfolio · strongest in max-field

gaps.detail: winners stack avg Vegas total 4.93 — top-total team 15.3% of stacks, low-total (<4.0) 4.8%
winners bring back the opponent 22.9% of stacked entries
winners max salary 54.9% of the time (avg spent $48825)

proposals.evidence: winners stack avg Vegas total 4.93, top-total team 15.3% of the time
proposals.rationale: bias stack-team selection toward the Vegas totals winners stack

proposals.evidence: winners bring back the opponent 22.9% of stacked entries

strengthen stack-shape conformance ×1.44 (build the winning 5-stack mix)

proposals.evidence: among winners, chalk-count POSITIVELY predicts ROI (r=0.166, n=137) — winners are balanced/chalky, NOT contrarian
